data.body: TS2 (09f9) held-out validation: 12/12 GREEN including ALL security tests (commit-ancestry boundary, backdated KILLER test, intra-commit refinement both directions, fail-closed git, resolved-record-shape). Fixed 1 test bug: hlc_epoch_surface_absent grep was over-strict (banned field-name STRINGS that legitimately appear in changelog comments + the required v4-snapshot migration pop) -> narrowed to removed FUNCTION names + record-field literals. Teeth confirmed: neutralizing revocation check (if revoked->if False) made boundary+backdated tests RED. RECOVERY NOTE: 'git checkout -- authorship.py' during teeth-restore CLOBBERED the implementer's UNCOMMITTED authorship.py rework (reverted to committed e165 epoch version); reducer/_state/_version/_cache/identity.py survived. Re-dispatched implementer to re-apply authorship.py only. LESSON: use file-backup copy for mutation-restore, NEVER git checkout on uncommitted impl.
